# Spec interview fixture pointer

Public silico cannot vendor the private practice GCU.

| Resource | Role |
|----------|------|
| [tig/xuss-lame](https://github.com/tig/xuss-lame) (private) | Deliberately thin/contradictory `spec.md` + anti-cheat AGENTS |
| [silico/knowledge/spec-interview.md](../../../silico/knowledge/spec-interview.md) | Agent guidance |
| [tig/silico#68](https://github.com/tig/silico/issues/68) | Issue |

**Anti-cheat:** agents in `xuss-lame` must not open `tig/xuss` or `tig/xuss-c` for product requirements.
